content: Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback loop for improving output can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of no extra training while fixing its common limitation of getting stuck in local optima from a single self-feedback perspective. This hybrid approach would allow LLMs to challenge their own initial feedback assumptions, much like a human thinker refining an argument by intentionally debating it from competing viewpoints.
